title: baldellia alpestris
intro: Baldellia alpestris, a rare and lesser-known aquatic plant species, is also known as the Alpine Baldellia or Baldellia. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Eastern Europe and Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Baldellia alpestris include reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
